name: Verity Credit Union
description_short: Verity Credit Union is a Pacific Northwest credit union operating 5 branches in Washington with digital banking, shared branching access to 6,000+ locations nationwide, and comprehensive financial services.
description_long:
Verity Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative serving the Pacific Northwest with a physical presence across Washington state. The credit union operates five branch locations in the Seattle-Auburn metropolitan area, including specialized branches at Lynnwood (Alderwood), Auburn, Seattle's Beacon Hill, Seattle's Northgate, and Seattle's Wallingford. As a credit union, Verity provides traditional banking services while offering members access to a nationwide shared branching network of nearly 6,000 credit union locations, enabling financial services access far beyond their immediate geographic footprint.

Verity's service offerings span personal and mortgage banking, including checking and savings accounts, loan applications and signings, mortgage origination, notary services, and cash management tools like cashier's checks and money orders. The credit union provides multiple service channels through digital banking platforms, a telephone teller system, ATM networks with 24-hour availability at most branches, and in-person consultations with member consultants available both by walk-in and appointment. Financial coaching and investment advisory services through CUSO Financial Services are available by appointment, with named advisors assigned to specific branches (Ken Butler at Auburn and Beacon Hill, Gavin Chinn at Alderwood and Wallingford, Joanne Wagner at Northgate).

Verity distinguishes itself through convenience features including drive-up windows at two Seattle locations, a dog-friendly policy at the Alderwood branch, hot coffee service, coin counters, conference rooms for member use, night drop boxes, and a kids' area. The credit union actively promotes member engagement through branch event calendars and emphasizes security communication, warning members about fraud attempts through their main contact line (800) 444-4589. Call center availability is limited to weekdays 8:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m., though digital banking and ATM access operate 24/7.

As a regional credit union, Verity's primary limitation is geographic—physical branches are concentrated in the Seattle-Tacoma-Lynnwood corridor of Washington state, though shared branching mitigates this for members traveling elsewhere. The call center's weekday-only hours may inconvenience members needing phone support on weekends or evenings. Like most traditional credit unions, Verity's product offerings appear more conservative compared to larger national banks, focusing on core banking and lending rather than premium investment or wealth management products. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Access to nearly 6,000 nationwide shared branching locations through CO-OP network, enabling banking services far beyond Washington state
24-hour ATM access at most branch locations (Auburn, Beacon Hill, Northgate, Wallingford) plus ATM-only shared branching at Wallingford
Multiple service channels including digital banking, telephone teller, in-person consultations, and drive-up windows at Beacon Hill and Northgate branches
Named financial advisors through CUSO Financial Services available by appointment at each branch for comprehensive financial planning
Member-centric amenities including dog-friendly policy (Alderwood), hot coffee, kids' areas, coin counters, and conference rooms
Flexible appointment scheduling available across all branches for loan applications, mortgage origination, and consultations
Comprehensive fraud protection messaging and dedicated security contact line to verify communications legitimacy
cons: Limited geographic footprint with only 5 branches concentrated in Seattle-Tacoma-Lynnwood area; limited option for in-person service in other Washington regions or states
Call center and member support only available Monday-Friday 8:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m.; no weekend or evening phone support hours
One branch (Alderwood) has a temporarily unavailable ATM, reducing cash access at that location
Beacon Hill branch located at VA Medical Center may have limited accessibility or specific membership requirements not detailed on website
Website content suggests limited investment or wealth management offerings compared to full-service financial institutions
best_for: Washington state residents in Seattle, Tacoma, Auburn, and Lynnwood metropolitan areas seeking traditional banking with personalized service and drive-up access
Credit union members who travel nationally and need reliable branch access through the 6,000-location shared branching network
First-time homebuyers and mortgage applicants in the Pacific Northwest wanting in-person loan origination with named mortgage consultants
Individuals seeking financial coaching and advisory services without switching to a separate wealth management firm
diagnosis: Verity Credit Union is ideal for Washington state residents and Pacific Northwest members seeking accessible, relationship-based banking with the flexibility of nationwide shared branching and appointment-based advisory services. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—branches are concentrated in the Seattle-Tacoma region, and weekday-only call center hours may inconvenience members needing evening or weekend support, though digital banking and ATM access remain available 24/7.
services: Checking and savings accounts (implied through digital banking and traditional teller services)
Account openings including new membership enrollment
Digital banking platform with mobile app (Apple and Android)
Cashier's checks, money orders, and cash withdrawal services
Investment advisory through CUSO Financial Services (by appointment with named advisors)
Shared branching access at 6,000+ credit union locations nationwide
Signature guarantee services (by appointment, Alderwood and Northgate branches)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
